title: Studio Zero Score Engine v1
description: Deterministic readiness-score parameters per PRD §10 (Strict elite gate, locked v0.2; rounding locked v0.4). Versioned: any change to weights, thresholds, or rounding mode is a new version file (score_engine.v2.json), never an in-place edit. Persisted to score_snapshots.score_engine_version on every snapshot so re-audits are mathematically comparable across time. The score formula is `score = max(0, round_half_even(100 - Σ weights[finding.severity]))`. The verdict rule is documented in `verdict_rule` below — keyed off Blocker-presence first, then score-band thresholds.

version.description: Engine version stamp. Echoed onto every audit-output.v1.score_engine_version and persisted to score_snapshots.score_engine_version.

weights.description: Per-severity point deductions. Sum across all findings, subtract from starting_score, then round_half_even.

thresholds.description: Score-band thresholds. Inclusive on both ends. Combined with the Blocker-override rule in `verdict_rule`.

rounding.description: Rounding mode. Locked v0.4 per Verify. `half-to-even` (banker's rounding) eliminates the Polish-decimal-sum ambiguity (e.g., 11 Polish = 5.5 deduction → 94 not 95).

starting_score.description: Starting score before deductions. 100 in v1.

score_floor.description: Lower clamp. `max(0, …)` in the PRD §10 formula corresponds to score_floor=0.

verdict_rule.description: Authoritative decision logic, in priority order. Implementations MUST evaluate in this exact order: (1) any Blocker → FAIL regardless of score; (2) score < fail_below → FAIL; (3) pass_with_fixes_min ≤ score ≤ pass_with_fixes_max → PASS WITH FIXES; (4) score ≥ pass_min → PASS.

category_score_rule.description: Optional. How each `score_breakdown.<category>` 0..100 is computed. v1 = same formula as the global score but restricted to findings tagged with the matching reviewer. Documented here so the test fixtures can also assert per-category math when desired.
